rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION OVERRULED. DEMURRER TO 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED NO BREACH ALLEGED. DEMURRER TO 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED NO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ACCOUNTING. (KS(EX))

rulings.Calendar Matter: For Change Of Venue; Declarations Of John D Montague And Monte Johnson

rulings.Case Title: GINA LEVY VS. BILL SEXTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND PREMISES LIABILITY SEPARATELY. DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR "NEGLIGENT/INTENTIONAL INFLICTION" SUSTAINED TO THE EXTENT IT ALLEGES INTENTIONAL INFLICTION, AS NO FACTS ARE PLED TO SUPPORT IT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. (JH)
